title: SEC Investor Advisory Committee Recommends Against Blanket Innovation Exemption for Tokenized Equities
message_html: SEC Investor Advisory Committee Recommends Against Blanket Innovation Exemption for Tokenized Equities ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): According to a draft recommendation from the SEC Investor Advisory Committee’s (IAC) Market Structure Subcommittee, regulators should not grant a blanket innovation exemption for the tokenization of equities. Instead, reforms should proceed through limited exemptions o
